# crowci_organization_registry (Data Source)

Get a container registry credential for an organization by org ID and registry address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "crowci_organization_registry" "example" {
  org_id  = 1
  address = "docker.io"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) Registry address (e.g. 'docker.io', 'ghcr.io').
- `org_id` (Number) ID of the organization this registry belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Creation time as a Unix timestamp.
- `id` (Number) Registry ID assigned by Crow CI.
- `readonly` (Boolean) Whether the registry is read-only.
- `updated_at` (Number) Last update time as a Unix timestamp.
- `username` (String) Registry username.
